message:
feat(stdlib): add more internal C accelerator modules

Add 12 new internal modules:
- _ast: AST compiler flags
- _contextvars: context variable support
- _queue: SimpleQueue for threading
- _imp: import machinery
- _opcode: bytecode opcode info
- _lsprof: profiler support
- _statistics: statistics helpers
- _symtable: symbol table support
- _markupbase: markup parsing base
- _sitebuiltins: site builtins (quit, help)
- _curses_panel: curses panel support
- _dbm: DBM database support

All modules integrated into module_functions.zig dispatch.

 /// Handler function type for module dispatchers
 const ModuleHandler = *const fn (*NativeCodegen, []ast.Node) CodegenError!void;

 /// Module to function map lookup
 const ModuleMap = std.StaticStringMap(FuncMap).initComptime(.{
     .{ "json", JsonFuncs },
